#SwifferPartner - I genuinely thought my floors were clean until I walked on them in white socks 😭 The upgraded @swiffer PowerMop definitely understood the assignment because WHY was the mop pad looking like that 👀 #WhiteSockApproved

#TidePartner 🧡 Besties, this tile is actually detergent. 
 
No pouring. No messy caps. No giant bottle taking up half the laundry room. You literally toss it in and it activates instantly in water…even cold water. 
Okay @tidelaundry …this is kinda wild. 
 
And Tide evo is on sale for the FIRST time ever right now! 👀 It’s $2 off for a limited time online + in store anywhere national coupons are accepted. Grab it on Amazon before the sale ends! #TideEvo #RealLaundryMagic #LaundryTok

Besties!!!! 5 million besties???? 🎉🎉🎉 What started with one video, on a random day somehow turned into this incredible community. Thank you for every view, every comment, every DM, every prayer, every laugh, every “girl where’d you get that from?” 😂🫶🏾

Y’all have watched me grow, grieve, heal, learn, create, and keep showing up. I’ll never take that lightly. Thank you for allowing me to be a small part of your daily lives.

5 MILLION on Instagram?! 🎉Glory to God always🙌🏾

#poppipartner Memorial Day prep but make it easy 💖 

Stocking up on my go-to poppi minis at Walmart…wild berry, shirley temple, and cream soda 

They’re the perfect fun-sized drinks for gatherings and I love that they fit right in my bag for on-the-go too ✨

Only 3g sugar, 20 calories, and prebiotics from agave root inulin + cassava root fiber… so it’s a simple swap I actually stick with @drinkpoppi

#PineSolPartner Say goodbye to winter blahs and hello to a tropical reset 🌴✨​ I’m refreshing my entire home with @pinesol Multi-Surface Cleaners, including the newest Tropical Breeze scent. One bottle works across multiple surfaces from kitchen counters to bathroom tiles to floors and so much more. Pine-Sol Multi-Surface Cleaner is available in stores nationwide and online at Walmart; check out my bio
